'''47-B-series droids''' were bipedal [[Droid/Legends|droids]] designed by [[Loratus Manufacturing]] to build and repair vehicles and buildings.

This non-combat field droid had been adapted by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] to assist in the repair of broken vehicles and damaged buildings amidst the heat of battle during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Droid-stub}}
